name: Fire Ninja
description: A lightning-fast shadow warrior. Hurls fireballs and vanishes in a puff of smoke.

ability.name: Shadow Flame
ability.description: Throw a fireball, then blink away into the shadows.

bigQuest.name: Way of the Flame
bigQuest.description:
Defeat {target} enemies with Shadow Flame.
